title: centaurea acaulis
intro: Centaurea acaulis, also known as Mountain Centaury, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. Centaurea acaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a convenient and natural way to harness its medicinal properties.
